---
title: "final"
author: "lj"
date: "2026-05-31"
output: html_document
---
# Data Processing and Cohort Definition. See Page 6 in the report. 
```{r}
# =========================================================
# 01_prepare_cox_df.Rmd
# Purpose:
#   Prepare final complete-case Cox dataset only.
#   Save cox_df_final_cc.rds for later model files.
# =========================================================

library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

# =========================================================
# 1. Connect to eICU database
# =========================================================

con_eicu <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  dbname = "eicu",
  host = "postgres",
  port = 5432,
  user = "student_readonly",
  password = "student_readonly_password_123"
)

dbExecute(con_eicu, "SET search_path TO eicu_crd")

# =========================================================
# 2. Extract basic patient table
# =========================================================

patient_raw <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT
    patientunitstayid,
    patienthealthsystemstayid,
    uniquepid,
    hospitaladmitoffset,
    unitdischargeoffset,
    unittype,
    unitstaytype
  FROM eicu_crd.patient
  WHERE hospitaladmitoffset IS NOT NULL
    AND unitdischargeoffset IS NOT NULL
    AND unitdischargeoffset > 0
") %>%
  as_tibble()

# =========================================================
# 3. Admission diagnosis and MAP availability
# =========================================================

adx_raw <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT DISTINCT
    patientunitstayid,
    admitdxpath
  FROM eicu_crd.admissiondx
") %>%
  as_tibble()

has_map <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT DISTINCT patientunitstayid
  FROM eicu_crd.vitalperiodic
  WHERE systemicmean IS NOT NULL
") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(has_map = 1L)

adx_flags <- adx_raw %>%
  mutate(
    admitdxpath = str_trim(admitdxpath),

    operative_dx = str_detect(admitdxpath, "\\|Operative\\|Diagnosis\\|"),
    operative_system = str_detect(admitdxpath, "Operative Organ Systems"),
    nonoperative_dx = str_detect(admitdxpath, "\\|Non-operative\\|Diagnosis\\|"),

    elective = str_detect(admitdxpath, "\\|Elective\\|Yes"),
    emergency = str_detect(admitdxpath, "\\|Emergency\\|Yes"),
    or_recent = str_detect(admitdxpath, "within 4 hours of admission\\?\\|Yes")
  ) %>%
  group_by(patientunitstayid) %>%
  summarise(
    has_operative_dx = as.integer(any(operative_dx | operative_system)),
    has_nonoperative_dx = as.integer(any(nonoperative_dx)),
    elective = as.integer(any(elective)),
    emergency = as.integer(any(emergency)),
    or_recent = as.integer(any(or_recent)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

rm(adx_raw, has_map)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 4. Build ICU-level data
# =========================================================

icu_full <- patient_raw %>%
  left_join(adx_flags, by = "patientunitstayid") %>%
  mutate(
    has_operative_dx = ifelse(is.na(has_operative_dx), 0L, has_operative_dx),
    has_nonoperative_dx = ifelse(is.na(has_nonoperative_dx), 0L, has_nonoperative_dx),
    elective = ifelse(is.na(elective), 0L, elective),
    emergency = ifelse(is.na(emergency), 0L, emergency),
    or_recent = ifelse(is.na(or_recent), 0L, or_recent),

    # temporary MAP flag will be added below
    start_time = -hospitaladmitoffset,
    end_time = start_time + unitdischargeoffset
  )

rm(patient_raw, adx_flags)
gc()

has_map2 <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT DISTINCT patientunitstayid
  FROM eicu_crd.vitalperiodic
  WHERE systemicmean IS NOT NULL
") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(has_map = 1L)

icu_full <- icu_full %>%
  left_join(has_map2, by = "patientunitstayid") %>%
  mutate(has_map = ifelse(is.na(has_map), 0L, has_map))

rm(has_map2)
gc()

hospital_with_map <- icu_full %>%
  group_by(patienthealthsystemstayid) %>%
  summarise(has_any_map = any(has_map == 1), .groups = "drop") %>%
 dplyr:: filter(has_any_map) %>%
  pull(patienthealthsystemstayid)

icu_full <- icu_full %>%
 dplyr:: filter(patienthealthsystemstayid %in% hospital_with_map)

rm(hospital_with_map)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 5. Determine index ICU stay. See Page 8 in the report.
# =========================================================

hospital_level <- icu_full %>%
  group_by(patienthealthsystemstayid) %>%
  arrange(start_time, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    is_operative_hospital = as.integer(any(has_operative_dx == 1)),

    is_candidate_index = case_when(
      is_operative_hospital == 1 &
        has_operative_dx == 1 &
        has_map == 1 ~ 1L,

      is_operative_hospital == 0 &
        has_map == 1 ~ 1L,

      TRUE ~ 0L
    ),

    is_index = as.integer(
      cumsum(is_candidate_index) == 1 &
        is_candidate_index == 1
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

valid_hospitals <- hospital_level %>%
  group_by(patienthealthsystemstayid) %>%
  summarise(has_valid_index = any(is_index == 1), .groups = "drop") %>%
 dplyr:: filter(has_valid_index) %>%
  pull(patienthealthsystemstayid)

hospital_level <- hospital_level %>%
 dplyr:: filter(patienthealthsystemstayid %in% valid_hospitals)

rm(valid_hospitals)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 6. Merge consecutive ICU stays from index ICU. See Page 8 in the report.
# Rule: gap <= 120 minutes
# =========================================================

merged_icu <- hospital_level %>%
  group_by(patienthealthsystemstayid) %>%
  arrange(start_time, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    row_id = row_number(),
    index_position = row_id[is_index == 1][1]
  ) %>%
 dplyr:: filter(row_id >= index_position) %>%
  mutate(
    gap_to_prev = start_time - lag(end_time),
    gap_to_prev = ifelse(is.na(gap_to_prev), Inf, gap_to_prev),

    new_chain = case_when(
      row_number() == 1 ~ 1L,
      gap_to_prev > 120 ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ 0L
    ),

    merge_chain = cumsum(new_chain)
  ) %>%
 dplyr:: filter(merge_chain == 1) %>%
  ungroup()

rm(hospital_level)
gc()

temp_merged <- merged_icu %>%
  group_by(patienthealthsystemstayid) %>%
  summarise(
    merged_start = min(start_time),
    merged_end = max(end_time),
    merged_duration = merged_end - merged_start,

    index_patientunitstayid = first(patientunitstayid[is_index == 1]),
    index_unittype = first(unittype[is_index == 1]),
    index_unitstaytype = first(unitstaytype[is_index == 1]),

    is_operative_hospital = first(is_operative_hospital),
    elective = first(elective[is_index == 1]),
    emergency = first(emergency[is_index == 1]),
    or_recent = first(or_recent[is_index == 1]),

    original_stay_ids = paste(patientunitstayid, collapse = ","),
    n_original_stays = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
 dplyr:: filter(merged_duration > 0)

final_cohort <- temp_merged %>%
 dplyr:: filter(merged_duration >= 720) %>%
  mutate(merged_id = row_number()) %>%
  select(
    merged_id,
    patienthealthsystemstayid,
    index_patientunitstayid,
    is_operative_hospital,
    elective,
    emergency,
    or_recent,
    merged_start,
    merged_end,
    merged_duration,
    index_unittype,
    index_unitstaytype,
    original_stay_ids,
    n_original_stays
  )

rm(merged_icu, temp_merged)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 7. Process MAP data: We identified outliers and interpolated missing values. Then excluded ICU stays that first valid MAP occurred >= 6h and missing rate >50% within the first 18h. See Page 10 in the report.
# =========================================================

icu_start_map <- icu_full %>%
  distinct(patientunitstayid, start_time)

rm(icu_full)
gc()

map_raw <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT patientunitstayid, observationoffset, systemicmean AS map
  FROM eicu_crd.vitalperiodic
  WHERE systemicmean IS NOT NULL
") %>%
  as_tibble()

map_abs <- map_raw %>%
  inner_join(icu_start_map, by = "patientunitstayid") %>%
  mutate(
    abs_time = start_time + observationoffset,
    map = ifelse(map >= 20 & map <= 200, map, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
 dplyr:: filter(abs_time >= 0) %>%
  select(patientunitstayid, abs_time, map)

rm(map_raw, icu_start_map)
gc()

cohort_stays <- final_cohort %>%
  mutate(original_id_list = strsplit(original_stay_ids, ",")) %>%
  select(
    merged_id,
    patienthealthsystemstayid,
    merged_start,
    merged_end,
    original_id_list
  ) %>%
  unnest(original_id_list) %>%
  mutate(original_id = as.integer(original_id_list)) %>%
  select(-original_id_list)

map_merged <- cohort_stays %>%
  inner_join(
    map_abs,
    by = c("original_id" = "patientunitstayid")
  ) %>%
 dplyr:: filter(abs_time >= merged_start & abs_time <= merged_end) %>%
  mutate(offset = abs_time - merged_start) %>%
  arrange(merged_id, offset)

rm(map_abs, cohort_stays)
gc()

# linear interpolation for short missing gaps
impute_gaps <- function(df, max_gap_min = 15) {

  df <- df[order(df$offset), ]
  n <- nrow(df)

  if (n == 0) return(df)

  df$imputed_flag <- FALSE

  rle_na <- rle(is.na(df$map))
  start_idx <- 1

  for (i in seq_along(rle_na$lengths)) {

    len <- rle_na$lengths[i]
    is_na <- rle_na$values[i]
    end_idx <- start_idx + len - 1

    if (is_na && len > 0) {

      pre_idx <- if (start_idx > 1) start_idx - 1 else NA
      post_idx <- if (end_idx < n) end_idx + 1 else NA

      gap_start_offset <- if (!is.na(pre_idx)) df$offset[pre_idx] else NA
      gap_end_offset <- if (!is.na(post_idx)) df$offset[post_idx] else NA

      if (!is.na(gap_start_offset) && !is.na(gap_end_offset)) {

        gap_duration <- gap_end_offset - gap_start_offset

        if (gap_duration <= max_gap_min) {

          pre_win <- df[
            df$offset >= (gap_start_offset - 15) &
              df$offset <= gap_start_offset &
              !is.na(df$map),
          ]

          post_win <- df[
            df$offset >= gap_end_offset &
              df$offset <= (gap_end_offset + 15) &
              !is.na(df$map),
          ]

          pre_mean <- if (nrow(pre_win) > 0) mean(pre_win$map) else NA
          post_mean <- if (nrow(post_win) > 0) mean(post_win$map) else NA

          if (!is.na(pre_mean) && !is.na(post_mean)) {

            for (j in start_idx:end_idx) {

              t <- df$offset[j]
              ratio <- (t - gap_start_offset) / gap_duration

              df$map[j] <- pre_mean * (1 - ratio) + post_mean * ratio
              df$imputed_flag[j] <- TRUE
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    start_idx <- end_idx + 1
  }

  return(df)
}

map_imputed <- map_merged %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    data_imputed = map(data, ~ impute_gaps(.x, max_gap_min = 15))
  ) %>%
  select(merged_id, data_imputed) %>%
  unnest(data_imputed)

rm(map_merged)
gc()

# MAP quality screening
first_map <- map_imputed %>%
 dplyr:: filter(!is.na(map)) %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  summarise(first_offset = min(offset), .groups = "drop")

max_records_18h <- 1080 / 5

actual_18h <- map_imputed %>%
 dplyr:: filter(offset <= 1080 & !is.na(map)) %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  summarise(actual_n = n(), .groups = "drop")

exclusion <- first_map %>%
  left_join(actual_18h, by = "merged_id") %>%
  mutate(
    actual_n = ifelse(is.na(actual_n), 0, actual_n),
    missing_rate_18h = 1 - actual_n / max_records_18h,
    missing_rate_18h = pmax(0, pmin(100, missing_rate_18h * 100)),
    pass_first = first_offset < 360,
    pass_missing = missing_rate_18h < 50,
    include = pass_first & pass_missing
  )

final_cohort_map_qc <- final_cohort %>%
  inner_join(exclusion, by = "merged_id") %>%
 dplyr:: filter(include == TRUE)

rm(first_map, actual_18h, exclusion)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 8. Cohort mapping
# =========================================================

mapping_df <- final_cohort_map_qc %>%
  select(merged_id, original_stay_ids) %>%
  separate_rows(original_stay_ids, sep = ",") %>%
  rename(original_id = original_stay_ids) %>%
  mutate(original_id = as.integer(original_id))

anchor_df <- mapping_df %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    merged_id,
    patientunitstayid = original_id
  )

cohort_map <- mapping_df %>%
  transmute(
    merged_id,
    patientunitstayid = original_id
  )

base_df <- final_cohort_map_qc %>%
  distinct(merged_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(
    merged_id,
    patienthealthsystemstayid,
    merged_start,
    merged_end,
    merged_duration
  )

rm(mapping_df, final_cohort_map_qc, final_cohort)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 9. Age screening. See Page 13 in the report.
# =========================================================

age_screen_df <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT
      patientunitstayid,
      age
  FROM eicu_crd.patient
") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  inner_join(anchor_df, by = "patientunitstayid") %>%
  mutate(
    age_raw = str_trim(as.character(age)),
    age_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(age_raw)),

    age_clean = case_when(
      age_raw == '> 89' ~ 90,
      !is.na(age_num) ~ age_num,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    age_in_range = case_when(
      age_raw == '> 89' ~ TRUE,
      !is.na(age_num) & age_num >= 18 & age_num <= 150 ~ TRUE,
      !is.na(age_num) & age_num < 18 ~ FALSE,
      !is.na(age_num) & age_num > 150 ~ FALSE,
      TRUE ~ TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    merged_id,
    age_clean,
    age_in_range
  )

adult_ids <- age_screen_df %>%
 dplyr:: filter(age_in_range) %>%
  select(
    merged_id,
    age_clean
  )

base_df <- base_df %>%
  inner_join(adult_ids, by = "merged_id")

anchor_df <- anchor_df %>%
  inner_join(adult_ids, by = "merged_id")

cohort_map <- cohort_map %>%
  inner_join(adult_ids, by = "merged_id")

rm(age_screen_df, adult_ids)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 10. Selected covariates only
# =========================================================

patient_cov_df <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT
      patientunitstayid,
      gender,
      ethnicity,
      admissionheight,
      admissionweight
  FROM eicu_crd.patient
") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  inner_join(anchor_df, by = "patientunitstayid") %>%
  mutate(
    gender = str_trim(as.character(gender)),
    gender_clean = case_when(
      gender == "Male" ~ "Male",
      gender == "Female" ~ "Female",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    ethnicity = str_trim(as.character(ethnicity)),
    ethnicity = ifelse(ethnicity == "", NA, ethnicity),

    admissionheight = as.numeric(admissionheight),
    admissionweight = as.numeric(admissionweight),

    admissionheight = ifelse(admissionheight < 100 | admissionheight > 250, NA, admissionheight),
    admissionweight = ifelse(admissionweight < 30 | admissionweight > 400, NA, admissionweight),

    bmi = admissionweight / (admissionheight / 100)^2
  ) %>%
  select(
    merged_id,
    gender_clean,
    ethnicity,
    bmi
  ) %>%
  distinct(merged_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

apache_df <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (patientunitstayid)
      patientunitstayid,
      actualhospitallos
  FROM eicu_crd.apachepatientresult
  ORDER BY patientunitstayid
") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  inner_join(anchor_df, by = "patientunitstayid") %>%
  select(
    merged_id,
    actualhospitallos
  ) %>%
  distinct(merged_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

surgery_df <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (patientunitstayid)
      patientunitstayid,
      electivesurgery
  FROM eicu_crd.apachepredvar
  ORDER BY patientunitstayid
") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  inner_join(anchor_df, by = "patientunitstayid") %>%
  mutate(
    surgery_type = case_when(
      is.na(electivesurgery) ~ "Non-surgical",
      electivesurgery == 0 ~ "Emergency",
      electivesurgery == 1 ~ "Elective",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    merged_id,
    surgery_type
  ) %>%
  distinct(merged_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

comorb_segment_df <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT
      patientunitstayid,

      MAX(CASE WHEN lower(pasthistorypath) LIKE '%hypertension%'
               THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hypertension,

      MAX(CASE WHEN lower(pasthistorypath) LIKE '%congestive heart failure%'
               THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS chf,

      MAX(CASE WHEN lower(pasthistorypath) LIKE '%copd%'
               THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS copd,

      MAX(CASE WHEN lower(pasthistorypath) LIKE '%atrial fibrillation%'
               THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS atrial_fibrillation,

      MAX(CASE WHEN lower(pasthistorypath) LIKE '%diabetes%'
               THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS diabetes,

      MAX(CASE WHEN lower(pasthistorypath) LIKE '%renal%'
               THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS renal_disease,

      MAX(CASE WHEN lower(pasthistorypath) LIKE '%myocardial infarction%'
               THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prior_mi

  FROM eicu_crd.pastHistory
  GROUP BY patientunitstayid
") %>%
  as_tibble()

comorb_df <- cohort_map %>%
  left_join(comorb_segment_df, by = "patientunitstayid") %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  summarise(
    hypertension = max(coalesce(hypertension, 0)),
    chf = max(coalesce(chf, 0)),
    copd = max(coalesce(copd, 0)),
    atrial_fibrillation = max(coalesce(atrial_fibrillation, 0)),
    diabetes = max(coalesce(diabetes, 0)),
    renal_disease = max(coalesce(renal_disease, 0)),
    prior_mi = max(coalesce(prior_mi, 0)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

rm(comorb_segment_df)
gc()

final_cov_df <- base_df %>%
  distinct(merged_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  left_join(patient_cov_df, by = "merged_id") %>%
  left_join(apache_df, by = "merged_id") %>%
  left_join(surgery_df, by = "merged_id") %>%
  left_join(comorb_df, by = "merged_id") %>%
  distinct(merged_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

rm(patient_cov_df, apache_df, surgery_df, comorb_df, base_df, anchor_df, cohort_map)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 11. Outcome processing. See Page 16 in the report.
# Main outcome: hospital LOS
# =========================================================

outcome_df <- final_cov_df %>%
  distinct(merged_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    hospital_los_days = actualhospitallos,

    hospital_los_invalid = ifelse(
      is.na(hospital_los_days) | hospital_los_days <= 0,
      1L,
      0L
    )
  )

final_analysis_cohort <- outcome_df %>%
 dplyr:: filter(hospital_los_invalid == 0) %>%
  distinct(merged_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

rm(final_cov_df, outcome_df)
gc()

# =========================================================
# 12. Hypotension exposure definition. See Page 11 in the report.
# Threshold: MAP < 65
# =========================================================

map_analysis <- map_imputed %>%
  inner_join(
    final_analysis_cohort %>%
      select(merged_id, merged_duration),
    by = "merged_id"
  ) %>%
  arrange(merged_id, offset) %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  arrange(offset, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    hypotension = ifelse(!is.na(map) & map < 65, 1L, 0L),

    prev_hypo = lag(hypotension),
    prev_offset = lag(offset),
    gap_min = offset - prev_offset,

    new_episode = case_when(
      hypotension == 1 & row_number() == 1 ~ 1L,
      hypotension == 1 & (is.na(prev_hypo) | prev_hypo == 0) ~ 1L,
      hypotension == 1 & !is.na(gap_min) & gap_min > 15 ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ 0L
    ),

    episode_id = ifelse(
      hypotension == 1,
      cumsum(new_episode),
      NA_real_
    ),

    next_offset = lead(offset),
    interval_min = next_offset - offset,

    interval_min = case_when(
      is.na(interval_min) ~ 5,
      interval_min <= 0 ~ 5,
      interval_min > 60 ~ 5,
      TRUE ~ interval_min
    ),

    map_deficit = ifelse(hypotension == 1, 65 - map, 0),
    auc_component = map_deficit * interval_min
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

rm(map_imputed)
gc()

event_freq_df <- map_analysis %>%
 dplyr:: filter(hypotension == 1) %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  summarise(
    hypo_event_n = n_distinct(episode_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

twa_df <- map_analysis %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  summarise(
    total_auc = sum(auc_component, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_monitor_time_min = sum(interval_min, na.rm = TRUE),

    hypo_twa = ifelse(
      total_monitor_time_min > 0,
      total_auc / total_monitor_time_min,
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

duration_df <- map_analysis %>%
 dplyr:: filter(hypotension == 1) %>%
  group_by(merged_id) %>%
  summarise(
    hypo_duration_min = sum(interval_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hypo_duration_hours = hypo_duration_min / 60
  )

rm(map_analysis)
gc()

exposure_df <- final_analysis_cohort %>%
  select(merged_id) %>%
  left_join(event_freq_df, by = "merged_id") %>%
  left_join(twa_df, by = "merged_id") %>%
  left_join(
    duration_df %>%
      select(merged_id, hypo_duration_min, hypo_duration_hours),
    by = "merged_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hypo_event_n = ifelse(is.na(hypo_event_n), 0, hypo_event_n),
    hypo_twa = ifelse(is.na(hypo_twa), 0, hypo_twa),
    hypo_duration_min = ifelse(is.na(hypo_duration_min), 0, hypo_duration_min),
    hypo_duration_hours = ifelse(is.na(hypo_duration_hours), 0, hypo_duration_hours)
  )

final_analysis_dataset <- final_analysis_cohort %>%
  left_join(exposure_df, by = "merged_id")

rm(event_freq_df, twa_df, duration_df, exposure_df, final_analysis_cohort)
gc()

cat("\n===== Final analysis dataset ready =====\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(final_analysis_dataset), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(final_analysis_dataset), "\n")

# =========================================================
# 13. Hospital discharge event
# Event = hospital discharge alive
# Censoring = in-hospital death
# =========================================================

hospital_status_df <- dbGetQuery(con_eicu, "
  SELECT
    patienthealthsystemstayid,
    hospitaldischargestatus
  FROM eicu_crd.patient
") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    hospitaldischargestatus = str_trim(as.character(hospitaldischargestatus))
  ) %>%
  group_by(patienthealthsystemstayid) %>%
  summarise(
    hospitaldischargestatus = case_when(
      any(hospitaldischargestatus == "Expired", na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Expired",
      any(hospitaldischargestatus == "Alive", na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Alive",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cox_pre_df <- final_analysis_dataset %>%
  left_join(
    hospital_status_df,
    by = "patienthealthsystemstayid"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hospital_discharge_event = case_when(
      hospitaldischargestatus == "Alive" ~ 1L,
      hospitaldischargestatus == "Expired" ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    )
  )

rm(final_analysis_dataset, hospital_status_df)
gc()

cat("\n===== Hospital Discharge Status Summary =====\n")
print(
  cox_pre_df %>%
    count(hospitaldischargestatus, hospital_discharge_event, name = "n") %>%
    arrange(desc(n))
)

# =========================================================
# 14. Final Cox dataset. Results see Page 21 in the report.
# CC uses only outcome + event + 3 exposures + selected covariates
# =========================================================

cox_df <- cox_pre_df %>%
  transmute(
    merged_id,

    hospital_los_days = hospital_los_days,
    hospital_discharge_event = hospital_discharge_event,

    hypo_event_n = hypo_event_n,
    hypo_twa = hypo_twa,
    hypo_duration_hours = hypo_duration_hours,

    age_clean = age_clean,
    bmi = bmi,

    gender_clean = as.factor(gender_clean),
    ethnicity = as.factor(ethnicity),
    surgery_type = as.factor(surgery_type),

    hypertension = as.factor(hypertension),
    chf = as.factor(chf),
    copd = as.factor(copd),
    atrial_fibrillation = as.factor(atrial_fibrillation),
    diabetes = as.factor(diabetes),
    renal_disease = as.factor(renal_disease),
    prior_mi = as.factor(prior_mi)
  ) %>%
 dplyr:: filter(
    !is.na(hospital_los_days),
    hospital_los_days > 0,
    !is.na(hospital_discharge_event)
  )

cat("\n===== Missingness Before Cox Complete-casedplyr::dplyr:: filtering =====\n")
print(sort(colSums(is.na(cox_df)), decreasing = TRUE))

cox_df <- cox_df %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  droplevels()

# Reference groups
if ("Female" %in% levels(cox_df$gender_clean)) {
  cox_df$gender_clean <- relevel(cox_df$gender_clean, ref = "Female")
}

if ("Caucasian" %in% levels(cox_df$ethnicity)) {
  cox_df$ethnicity <- relevel(cox_df$ethnicity, ref = "Caucasian")
}

if ("Non-surgical" %in% levels(cox_df$surgery_type)) {
  cox_df$surgery_type <- relevel(cox_df$surgery_type, ref = "Non-surgical")
}

cat("\n===== Final Cox Dataset =====\n")
cat("Rows used in Cox models:", nrow(cox_df), "\n")
cat("Hospital discharged alive events:", sum(cox_df$hospital_discharge_event == 1), "\n")
cat("Hospital death censored:", sum(cox_df$hospital_discharge_event == 0), "\n")

cat("\n===== Exposure Summary in Final Cox Dataset =====\n")
cat("\nHypotension event frequency:\n")
print(summary(cox_df$hypo_event_n))

cat("\nHypotension TWA burden:\n")
print(summary(cox_df$hypo_twa))

cat("\nHypotension cumulative duration, hours:\n")
print(summary(cox_df$hypo_duration_hours))

# =========================================================
# 15. Save final Cox dataset
# =========================================================

saveRDS(cox_df, "cox_df_final_cc.rds")

write.csv(
  cox_df,
  "cox_df_final_cc.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nSaved final complete-case Cox dataset:\n")
cat("cox_df_final_cc.rds\n")
cat("cox_df_final_cc.csv\n")

dbDisconnect(con_eicu)
```





# Unadjusted Model
```{r}
# =========================================================
# 21. Mortality Rate in Final Cox Cohort
# =========================================================

cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("       MORTALITY RATE IN FINAL COX COHORT\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

n_total <- nrow(cox_df)
n_alive <- sum(cox_df$hospital_discharge_event == 1)
n_dead <- sum(cox_df$hospital_discharge_event == 0)

cat("Total patients in final Cox cohort:", n_total, "\n")
cat("Discharged alive:", n_alive, 
    "(", round(n_alive / n_total * 100, 2), "%)\n")
cat("Died in hospital:", n_dead, 
    "(", round(n_dead / n_total * 100, 2), "%)\n")
cat("In-hospital mortality rate:", 
    round(n_dead / n_total * 100, 2), "%\n")
```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# 22. Univariate Cox Regression Models — Censored
# Event = alive discharge (hospital_discharge_event = 1)
# Censored = in-hospital death (hospital_discharge_event = 0)
# After defining the final cohort, we built a univariate cox model. See Page 17 in the report.  
# =========================================================


cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("       CENSORED COX MODELS (DEATH AS CENSORED)\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

# --- Model B1: Exposure = hypo_event_n ---
cox_B1 <- coxph(
  Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ hypo_event_n,
  data = cox_df,
  ties = "efron",
  x = TRUE, y = TRUE
)

cat("\n----- Model B1: Exposure = hypo_event_n -----\n")
summary(cox_B1)

# --- Model B2: Exposure = hypo_twa ---
cox_B2 <- coxph(
  Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ hypo_twa,
  data = cox_df,
  ties = "efron",
  x = TRUE, y = TRUE
)

cat("\n----- Model B2: Exposure = hypo_twa -----\n")
summary(cox_B2)

# --- Model B3: Exposure = hypo_duration_hours ---
cox_B3 <- coxph(
  Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ hypo_duration_hours,
  data = cox_df,
  ties = "efron",
  x = TRUE, y = TRUE
)

cat("\n----- Model B3: Exposure = hypo_duration_hours -----\n")
summary(cox_B3)
```

# Hypotension Exposure smmary (see page 15 in report)
```{r}
# =========================================================
# Hypotension exposure summary
# Complete-case Cox cohort
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# =========================================================
# 1. Overall exposure summary
# =========================================================

cat("\n===== Hypotension Exposure Summary =====\n")

# any hypotension
cat("\nAny hypotension:\n")

print(
  table(cox_df$hypo_event_n > 0)
)

cat("\nPercentage with hypotension:\n")

print(
  prop.table(table(cox_df$hypo_event_n > 0)) * 100
)

# frequency
cat("\n===== Hypotension Event Frequency =====\n")

print(summary(cox_df$hypo_event_n))

print(
  quantile(
    cox_df$hypo_event_n,
    probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

# duration
cat("\n===== Hypotension Duration (hours) =====\n")

print(summary(cox_df$hypo_duration_hours))

print(
  quantile(
    cox_df$hypo_duration_hours,
    probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

# TWA
cat("\n===== Hypotension TWA Burden =====\n")

print(summary(cox_df$hypo_twa))

print(
  quantile(
    cox_df$hypo_twa,
    probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)
#

# =========================================================
# Figure 2A
# Distribution of hypotension cumulative duration
# =========================================================
duration_plot_df <- cox_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(hypo_duration_hours))

duration_upper <- quantile(
  duration_plot_df$hypo_duration_hours,
  0.99,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

p_duration <- ggplot(
  duration_plot_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(hypo_duration_hours <= duration_upper),
  aes(x = hypo_duration_hours)
) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 60,
    fill = "#1F78B4",
    color = "white",
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Hypotension Cumulative Duration",
    x = "Hypotension cumulative duration (hours)",
    y = "Patient count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p_duration)
#

# =========================================================
# Figure 2B
# Distribution of hypotension TWA burden
# =========================================================

twa_upper <- quantile(
  cox_df$hypo_twa,
  0.99,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

p_twa <- ggplot(
  cox_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(hypo_twa <= twa_upper),
  aes(x = hypo_twa)
) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 60,
    fill = "#6A3D9A",
    color = "white",
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Hypotension TWA Burden",
    x = "Time-weighted average hypotension burden (mmHg)",
    y = "Patient count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p_twa)
#

# =========================================================
# Figure 2C
# Distribution of hypotension episode frequency
# =========================================================

freq_upper <- quantile(
  cox_df$hypo_event_n,
  0.99,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

p_freq <- ggplot(
  cox_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(hypo_event_n <= freq_upper),
  aes(x = hypo_event_n)
) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 60,
    fill = "#B2182B",
    color = "white",
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Hypotension Episode Frequency",
    x = "Number of hypotension episodes",
    y = "Patient count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p_freq)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# 23. MODEL EVALUATION
# Then we evaluate the model performance. See Page 18 in the report.
# =========================================================

cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("       MODEL EVALUATION\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 23.1 Discrimination: Harrell's C-index
# ---------------------------------------------------------

cat("\n===== 23.1 Discrimination: Harrell's C-index =====\n")

c_B1 <- summary(cox_B1)$concordance
c_B2 <- summary(cox_B2)$concordance
c_B3 <- summary(cox_B3)$concordance

c_index_table <- data.frame(
  model = c("B1: hypo_event_n",
            "B2: hypo_twa",
            "B3: hypo_duration_hours"),
  C_index = round(c(c_B1["C"], c_B2["C"], c_B3["C"]), 4),
  SE = round(c(c_B1["se(C)"], c_B2["se(C)"], c_B3["se(C)"]), 4)
)

print(c_index_table)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 23.2 Discrimination: Truncated C-index at multiple time horizons
# ---------------------------------------------------------

cat("\n===== 23.2 Discrimination: C-index at time horizons =====\n")

eval_times <- c(7, 14, 21, 30)

trunc_c <- function(model, data, time_var, event_var, t_max) {
  d <- data
  d$time_trunc <- pmin(d[[time_var]], t_max)
  d$event_trunc <- ifelse(d[[time_var]] <= t_max & d[[event_var]] == 1, 1L, 0L)
  
  lp <- predict(model, newdata = d, type = "lp")
  conc <- concordance(Surv(d$time_trunc, d$event_trunc) ~ lp)
  return(conc$concordance)
}

tdC_results <- expand.grid(
  model = c("B1", "B2", "B3"),
  time = eval_times,
  C_index = NA_real_,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(tdC_results))) {
  mod <- switch(tdC_results$model[i],
                "B1" = cox_B1,
                "B2" = cox_B2,
                "B3" = cox_B3)
  tdC_results$C_index[i] <- round(
    trunc_c(mod, cox_df, "hospital_los_days", 
            "hospital_discharge_event", tdC_results$time[i]), 4
  )
}

print(tdC_results)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 23.3 Overall Fit: R², AIC, BIC, Likelihood Ratio Test
# ---------------------------------------------------------

cat("\n===== 23.3 Overall Fit: R², AIC, BIC, Likelihood Ratio =====\n")

extract_fit_stats <- function(model, model_label) {
  s <- summary(model)
  rsq <- s$rsq
  aic_val <- AIC(model)
  bic_val <- BIC(model)
  lr_test <- s$logtest
  
  data.frame(
    model = model_label,
    R2 = round(rsq[1], 6),
    R2_max = round(rsq[2], 6),
    AIC = round(aic_val, 2),
    BIC = round(bic_val, 2),
    LR_chisq = round(lr_test[1], 4),
    LR_df = lr_test[2],
    LR_p = signif(lr_test[3], 4)
  )
}

fit_table <- bind_rows(
  extract_fit_stats(cox_B1, "B1: hypo_event_n"),
  extract_fit_stats(cox_B2, "B2: hypo_twa"),
  extract_fit_stats(cox_B3, "B3: hypo_duration_hours")
)

print(fit_table)

cat("\nInterpretation:\n")
cat("- Lower AIC/BIC = better fit\n")
cat("- Higher R² = more variance explained\n")
cat("- LR p < 0.05 = model significantly better than null\n")

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 23.4 PH Assumption Check: Schoenfeld Residuals
# ---------------------------------------------------------

cat("\n===== 23.4 PH Assumption: Schoenfeld Residual Test =====\n")

ph_B1 <- cox.zph(cox_B1)
ph_B2 <- cox.zph(cox_B2)
ph_B3 <- cox.zph(cox_B3)

ph_table <- data.frame(
  model = c("B1: hypo_event_n",
            "B2: hypo_twa",
            "B3: hypo_duration_hours"),
  chisq = round(c(ph_B1$table[1, "chisq"],
                   ph_B2$table[1, "chisq"],
                   ph_B3$table[1, "chisq"]), 4),
  p_value = signif(c(ph_B1$table[1, "p"],
                      ph_B2$table[1, "p"],
                      ph_B3$table[1, "p"]), 4),
  PH_satisfied = ifelse(
    c(ph_B1$table[1, "p"], ph_B2$table[1, "p"], ph_B3$table[1, "p"]) > 0.05,
    "Yes", "No"
  )
)

print(ph_table)

cat("\nInterpretation:\n")
cat("- p > 0.05: No evidence against PH assumption (satisfied)\n")
cat("- p < 0.05: PH assumption may be violated\n")

# Schoenfeld residual plots
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
plot(ph_B1, main = "B1: hypo_event_n")
plot(ph_B2, main = "B2: hypo_twa")
plot(ph_B3, main = "B3: hypo_duration_hours")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 23.5 Calibration: Predicted vs Observed Survival
# ---------------------------------------------------------

cat("\n===== 23.5 Calibration =====\n")

median_los <- median(cox_df$hospital_los_days)
cat("Calibration evaluated at median hospital LOS:", 
    round(median_los, 2), "days\n\n")

calibrate_cox <- function(model, data, time_point, event_var, model_label) {
  lp <- predict(model, type = "lp")
  n_groups <- 5
  data$lp <- lp
  data$lp_group <- cut(lp, 
                        breaks = quantile(lp, probs = seq(0, 1, 1/n_groups)),
                        include.lowest = TRUE,
                        labels = 1:n_groups)
  
  cal_results <- data %>%
    group_by(lp_group) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      mean_lp = mean(lp),
      observed_event_rate = mean(
        hospital_los_days <= time_point & .data[[event_var]] == 1
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(model = model_label)
  
  return(cal_results)
}

cal_B1 <- calibrate_cox(cox_B1, cox_df, median_los, 
                         "hospital_discharge_event", 
                         "B1: hypo_event_n")
cal_B2 <- calibrate_cox(cox_B2, cox_df, median_los, 
                         "hospital_discharge_event", 
                         "B2: hypo_twa")
cal_B3 <- calibrate_cox(cox_B3, cox_df, median_los, 
                         "hospital_discharge_event", 
                         "B3: hypo_duration_hours")

cat("Calibration table (Model B1):\n")
print(cal_B1)
cat("\nCalibration table (Model B2):\n")
print(cal_B2)
cat("\nCalibration table (Model B3):\n")
print(cal_B3)

# Calibration plots
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

plot(1:5, cal_B1$observed_event_rate, 
     type = "b", col = "blue", pch = 16,
     xlab = "Risk Group (by linear predictor)",
     ylab = paste0("Discharge rate by day ", round(median_los, 1)),
     main = "Calibration: B1 (hypo_event_n)",
     ylim = c(0, 1))
abline(lm(observed_event_rate ~ as.numeric(lp_group), data = cal_B1), 
       col = "red", lty = 2)
legend("topright", legend = c("Observed", "Trend"), 
       col = c("blue", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), pch = c(16, NA), cex = 0.8)

plot(1:5, cal_B2$observed_event_rate, 
     type = "b", col = "blue", pch = 16,
     xlab = "Risk Group (by linear predictor)",
     ylab = paste0("Discharge rate by day ", round(median_los, 1)),
     main = "Calibration: B2 (hypo_twa)",
     ylim = c(0, 1))
abline(lm(observed_event_rate ~ as.numeric(lp_group), data = cal_B2), 
       col = "red", lty = 2)
legend("topright", legend = c("Observed", "Trend"), 
       col = c("blue", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), pch = c(16, NA), cex = 0.8)

plot(1:5, cal_B3$observed_event_rate, 
     type = "b", col = "blue", pch = 16,
     xlab = "Risk Group (by linear predictor)",
     ylab = paste0("Discharge rate by day ", round(median_los, 1)),
     main = "Calibration: B3 (hypo_duration_hours)",
     ylim = c(0, 1))
abline(lm(observed_event_rate ~ as.numeric(lp_group), data = cal_B3), 
       col = "red", lty = 2)
legend("topright", legend = c("Observed", "Trend"), 
       col = c("blue", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), pch = c(16, NA), cex = 0.8)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```





```{r}
# =========================================================
# 24. Comprehensive Summary Table
# =========================================================

cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("       COMPREHENSIVE MODEL COMPARISON\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

extract_main_result <- function(model, model_label) {
  s <- summary(model)
  data.frame(
    model = model_label,
    HR = round(s$coefficients[1, "exp(coef)"], 4),
    CI_lower = round(s$conf.int[1, "lower .95"], 4),
    CI_upper = round(s$conf.int[1, "upper .95"], 4),
    p_value = signif(s$coefficients[1, "Pr(>|z|)"], 4)
  )
}

hr_table <- bind_rows(
  extract_main_result(cox_B1, "B1: hypo_event_n"),
  extract_main_result(cox_B2, "B2: hypo_twa"),
  extract_main_result(cox_B3, "B3: hypo_duration_hours")
)

final_comparison <- hr_table %>%
  left_join(c_index_table, by = "model") %>%
  left_join(
    fit_table %>% select(model, R2, AIC, BIC, LR_p),
    by = "model"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    ph_table %>% select(model, PH_satisfied, p_value) %>%
      rename(PH_p = p_value),
    by = "model"
  )

cat("\n----- Final Comparison Table -----\n")
print(final_comparison)

# --- Interpretation ---
cat("\n----- Interpretation -----\n")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(hr_table))) {
  cat("\n", hr_table$model[i], ":\n")
  cat("  HR =", hr_table$HR[i], 
      " (95% CI:", hr_table$CI_lower[i], "-", hr_table$CI_upper[i], ")\n")
  if (hr_table$HR[i] < 1) {
    cat("  Each unit increase in exposure is associated with a ",
        round((1 - hr_table$HR[i]) * 100, 2), 
        "% reduction in the hazard of alive discharge,\n",
        "  meaning longer hospital stay (delayed recovery).\n")
  } else {
    cat("  Each unit increase in exposure is associated with a ",
        round((hr_table$HR[i] - 1) * 100, 2), 
        "% increase in the hazard of alive discharge.\n")
  }
}
```




```{r}
# =========================================================
# 25. KM Curves — Each Exposure Separately
# =========================================================

par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

# --- KM for B1: hypo_event_n groups ---
cox_df$event_n_group <- cut(
  cox_df$hypo_event_n,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 0, 3, 10, Inf),
  labels = c("0 events", "1-3 events", "4-10 events", ">10 events"),
  right = TRUE
)

km_B1 <- survfit(
  Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ event_n_group,
  data = cox_df
)

plot(km_B1, col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
     xlab = "Days", ylab = "Proportion remaining in hospital",
     main = "KM: By Hypotension Event Count (B1)")
legend("topright", 
       legend = levels(cox_df$event_n_group),
       col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
       title = "Events", cex = 0.7)

# --- KM for B2: hypo_twa groups ---
cox_df$twa_group <- cut(
  cox_df$hypo_twa,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 0, 0.5, 2, Inf),
  labels = c("TWA = 0", "TWA 0-0.5", "TWA 0.5-2", "TWA > 2"),
  right = TRUE
)

km_B2 <- survfit(
  Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ twa_group,
  data = cox_df
)

plot(km_B2, col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
     xlab = "Days", ylab = "Proportion remaining in hospital",
     main = "KM: By Hypotension TWA (B2)")
legend("topright", 
       legend = levels(cox_df$twa_group),
       col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
       title = "TWA (mmHg)", cex = 0.7)

# --- KM for B3: hypo_duration_hours groups ---
cox_df$duration_group <- cut(
  cox_df$hypo_duration_hours,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 0, 1, 4, Inf),
  labels = c("None (0h)", "Short (0-1h)", "Moderate (1-4h)", "Long (>4h)"),
  right = TRUE
)

km_B3 <- survfit(
  Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ duration_group,
  data = cox_df
)

plot(km_B3, col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
     xlab = "Days", ylab = "Proportion remaining in hospital",
     main = "KM: By Hypotension Duration (B3)")
legend("topright", 
       legend = levels(cox_df$duration_group),
       col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
       title = "Duration", cex = 0.7)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

# --- Log-rank tests for each ---
cat("\nLog-rank test (B1: Event count groups):\n")
print(survdiff(Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ event_n_group, data = cox_df))

cat("\nLog-rank test (B2: TWA groups):\n")
print(survdiff(Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ twa_group, data = cox_df))

cat("\nLog-rank test (B3: Duration groups):\n")
print(survdiff(Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ duration_group, data = cox_df))

# --- Group distributions ---
cat("\nEvent count group distribution:\n")
print(table(cox_df$event_n_group))
cat("\nTWA group distribution:\n")
print(table(cox_df$twa_group))
cat("\nDuration group distribution:\n")
print(table(cox_df$duration_group))
```




```{r}
# =========================================================
# 26. Save All Unadjusted Model Results to Folder. See Page 28 in the report.
# =========================================================

output_dir <- "model1_results"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# --- 1. Save model objects ---
saveRDS(cox_B1, file.path(output_dir, "cox_B1_model.rds"))
saveRDS(cox_B2, file.path(output_dir, "cox_B2_model.rds"))
saveRDS(cox_B3, file.path(output_dir, "cox_B3_model.rds"))

# --- 2. Save tables as CSV ---

write.csv(
  bind_rows(
    as.data.frame(summary(cox_B1)$coefficients) %>% mutate(Variable = rownames(.), Model = "B1"),
    as.data.frame(summary(cox_B2)$coefficients) %>% mutate(Variable = rownames(.), Model = "B2"),
    as.data.frame(summary(cox_B3)$coefficients) %>% mutate(Variable = rownames(.), Model = "B3")
  ),
  file.path(output_dir, "22_univariable_censored_coefficients.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(c_index_table, file.path(output_dir, "23_1_C_index_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tdC_results, file.path(output_dir, "23_2_truncated_C_index.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(fit_table, file.path(output_dir, "23_3_overall_fit.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(ph_table, file.path(output_dir, "23_4_PH_test.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cal_B1, file.path(output_dir, "23_5_calibration_B1.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cal_B2, file.path(output_dir, "23_5_calibration_B2.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cal_B3, file.path(output_dir, "23_5_calibration_B3.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(final_comparison, file.path(output_dir, "24_final_comparison.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(hr_table, file.path(output_dir, "24_HR_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Save group distribution tables
write.csv(
  as.data.frame(table(cox_df$event_n_group)),
  file.path(output_dir, "25_group_distribution_B1.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  as.data.frame(table(cox_df$twa_group)),
  file.path(output_dir, "25_group_distribution_B2.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(
  as.data.frame(table(cox_df$duration_group)),
  file.path(output_dir, "25_group_distribution_B3.csv"), row.names = FALSE
)

# --- 3. Save plots as PDF ---

# Schoenfeld residual plots
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "23_4_schoenfeld_residuals.pdf"), width = 12, height = 4)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
plot(ph_B1, main = "B1: hypo_event_n")
plot(ph_B2, main = "B2: hypo_twa")
plot(ph_B3, main = "B3: hypo_duration_hours")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
dev.off()

# Calibration plots
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "23_5_calibration_plots.pdf"), width = 15, height = 5)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

plot(1:5, cal_B1$observed_event_rate, 
     type = "b", col = "blue", pch = 16,
     xlab = "Risk Group (by linear predictor)",
     ylab = paste0("Discharge rate by day ", round(median_los, 1)),
     main = "Calibration: B1 (hypo_event_n)",
     ylim = c(0, 1))
abline(lm(observed_event_rate ~ as.numeric(lp_group), data = cal_B1), 
       col = "red", lty = 2)
legend("topright", legend = c("Observed", "Trend"), 
       col = c("blue", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), pch = c(16, NA), cex = 0.8)

plot(1:5, cal_B2$observed_event_rate, 
     type = "b", col = "blue", pch = 16,
     xlab = "Risk Group (by linear predictor)",
     ylab = paste0("Discharge rate by day ", round(median_los, 1)),
     main = "Calibration: B2 (hypo_twa)",
     ylim = c(0, 1))
abline(lm(observed_event_rate ~ as.numeric(lp_group), data = cal_B2), 
       col = "red", lty = 2)
legend("topright", legend = c("Observed", "Trend"), 
       col = c("blue", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), pch = c(16, NA), cex = 0.8)

plot(1:5, cal_B3$observed_event_rate, 
     type = "b", col = "blue", pch = 16,
     xlab = "Risk Group (by linear predictor)",
     ylab = paste0("Discharge rate by day ", round(median_los, 1)),
     main = "Calibration: B3 (hypo_duration_hours)",
     ylim = c(0, 1))
abline(lm(observed_event_rate ~ as.numeric(lp_group), data = cal_B3), 
       col = "red", lty = 2)
legend("topright", legend = c("Observed", "Trend"), 
       col = c("blue", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), pch = c(16, NA), cex = 0.8)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
dev.off()

# KM curves — 3 panels, one per exposure
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "25_KM_curves.pdf"), width = 15, height = 5)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

# Panel A: B1 — Event count groups
plot(km_B1, col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
     xlab = "Days", ylab = "Proportion remaining in hospital",
     main = "KM: By Hypotension Event Count (B1)\n(Death censored, alive discharge = event)")
legend("topright", 
       legend = levels(cox_df$event_n_group),
       col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
       title = "Events", cex = 0.7)

# Panel B: B2 — TWA groups
plot(km_B2, col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
     xlab = "Days", ylab = "Proportion remaining in hospital",
     main = "KM: By Hypotension TWA (B2)\n(Death censored, alive discharge = event)")
legend("topright", 
       legend = levels(cox_df$twa_group),
       col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
       title = "TWA (mmHg)", cex = 0.7)

# Panel C: B3 — Duration groups
plot(km_B3, col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
     xlab = "Days", ylab = "Proportion remaining in hospital",
     main = "KM: By Hypotension Duration (B3)\n(Death censored, alive discharge = event)")
legend("topright", 
       legend = levels(cox_df$duration_group),
       col = c("green3", "blue", "orange", "red"), lwd = 2,
       title = "Duration", cex = 0.7)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
dev.off()

# --- 4. Save full text summary ---
sink(file.path(output_dir, "full_model_summary.txt"))

cat("============================================================\n")
cat("Model 1: Univariable Cox PH Models (Censored) - Full Summary\n")
cat("Date:", as.character(Sys.time()), "\n")
cat("============================================================\n\n")

cat("--- Mortality Rate ---\n")
cat("Total patients:", n_total, "\n")
cat("Discharged alive:", n_alive, "(", round(n_alive/n_total*100, 2), "%)\n")
cat("Died in hospital:", n_dead, "(", round(n_dead/n_total*100, 2), "%)\n\n")

cat("\n--- Cox Model B1 (hypo_event_n) ---\n")
print(summary(cox_B1))

cat("\n\n--- Cox Model B2 (hypo_twa) ---\n")
print(summary(cox_B2))

cat("\n\n--- Cox Model B3 (hypo_duration_hours) ---\n")
print(summary(cox_B3))

cat("\n\n--- C-index Table ---\n")
print(c_index_table)

cat("\n\n--- Truncated C-index ---\n")
print(tdC_results)

cat("\n\n--- Overall Fit ---\n")
print(fit_table)

cat("\n\n--- PH Assumption Tests ---\n")
print(ph_table)

cat("\n\n--- Calibration (B1) ---\n")
print(cal_B1)

cat("\n\n--- Calibration (B2) ---\n")
print(cal_B2)

cat("\n\n--- Calibration (B3) ---\n")
print(cal_B3)

cat("\n\n--- Final Comparison ---\n")
print(final_comparison)

# UPDATED: 3 log-rank tests
cat("\n\n--- Log-rank Test (B1: Event count groups) ---\n")
print(survdiff(Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ event_n_group, data = cox_df))

cat("\n\n--- Log-rank Test (B2: TWA groups) ---\n")
print(survdiff(Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ twa_group, data = cox_df))

cat("\n\n--- Log-rank Test (B3: Duration groups) ---\n")
print(survdiff(Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ duration_group, data = cox_df))

# UPDATED: 3 group distributions
cat("\n\n--- Event Count Group Distribution (B1) ---\n")
print(table(cox_df$event_n_group))

cat("\n\n--- TWA Group Distribution (B2) ---\n")
print(table(cox_df$twa_group))

cat("\n\n--- Duration Group Distribution (B3) ---\n")
print(table(cox_df$duration_group))

sink()

# --- 5. Save workspace ---
model1_objects <- c(
  "cox_B1", "cox_B2", "cox_B3",
  "ph_B1", "ph_B2", "ph_B3",
  "km_B1", "km_B2", "km_B3",
  "cal_B1", "cal_B2", "cal_B3",
  "c_index_table", "tdC_results", "fit_table", "ph_table",
  "hr_table", "final_comparison",
  "cox_df", "median_los"
)
save(list = model1_objects, file = file.path(output_dir, "model1_workspace.RData"))

cat("\n✅ All results saved to folder:", normalizePath(output_dir), "\n")
```

# Figure flowchat: cohort selection
```{r}
# =========================================================
# FIGURE  FLOWCHART NUMBERS (see page 21)
# =========================================================

flow_table <- tibble(

  Step = c(
    "Original ICU stays",
    "After basic patient filtering",
    "Merged ICU stays",
    "Merged stays with valid MAP",
    "After MAP quality screening",
    "After age screening",
    "Final complete-case Cox cohort"
  ),

  N = c(
    200859,
    nrow(patient_raw),
    nrow(final_cohort),
    nrow(final_cohort) - sum(is.na(exclusion$include)),
    nrow(final_cohort_map_qc),
    nrow(final_cov_df),
    nrow(cox_df)
  )
)

flow_table <- flow_table %>%
  mutate(
    Excluded =
      lag(N) - N
  )

cat("\n=================================\n")
cat("FIGURE 1 FLOWCHART NUMBERS\n")
cat("=================================\n")

print(flow_table)
```



# Adjusted Model
```{r}
# =========================================================
# 02_baseline_vif.Rmd
# Candidate VIF + Final VIF + Baseline Cox models
# We checked the VIF of covariates. See Page 19 in the report.
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(survival)

# Final Cox dataset
cox_df <- readRDS("cox_df_final_cc.rds")

# Candidate VIF dataset, if available
if (file.exists("cox_candidate_vif_df.rds")) {
  cox_candidate_vif_df <- readRDS("cox_candidate_vif_df.rds")
} else {
  cox_candidate_vif_df <- NULL
}

# =========================================================
# Define variables
# =========================================================

exposure_vars <- c(
  "hypo_event_n",
  "hypo_twa",
  "hypo_duration_hours"
)

final_covariates <- c(
  "age_clean",
  "bmi",
  "gender_clean",
  "ethnicity",
  "surgery_type",
  "hypertension",
  "chf",
  "copd",
  "atrial_fibrillation",
  "diabetes",
  "renal_disease",
  "prior_mi"
)

candidate_covariates <- c(
  "age_clean",
  "bmi",
  "gender_clean",
  "ethnicity",
  "unitvisitnumber_grp",
  "unittype",
  "unitstaytype",
  "hospitaladmitsource",
  "surgery_type",
  "diagnosis_category",
  "hypertension",
  "chf",
  "copd",
  "atrial_fibrillation",
  "diabetes",
  "renal_disease",
  "prior_mi"
)

# =========================================================
# VIF function
# =========================================================

calculate_vif_from_formula <- function(formula, data) {
  
  x <- model.matrix(formula, data = data)
  x <- x[, colnames(x) != "(Intercept)", drop = FALSE]
  
  vif_values <- sapply(seq_len(ncol(x)), function(i) {
    
    y <- x[, i]
    others <- x[, -i, drop = FALSE]
    
    if (sd(y, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) {
      return(NA_real_)
    }
    
    fit <- lm(y ~ others)
    r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
    
    if (is.na(r2) || r2 >= 1) {
      return(Inf)
    }
    
    1 / (1 - r2)
  })
  
  data.frame(
    variable = colnames(x),
    VIF = vif_values,
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

run_vif_check <- function(data, exposure, covariates, label) {
  
  vif_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "~",
      paste(c(exposure, covariates), collapse = " + ")
    )
  )
  
  vif_table <- calculate_vif_from_formula(vif_formula, data) %>%
    mutate(
      exposure = exposure,
      vif_set = label
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(VIF))
  
  return(vif_table)
}

# =========================================================
# 1. Candidate VIF check
# Used to justify variable exclusion
# =========================================================

candidate_vif_all <- list()

if (!is.null(cox_candidate_vif_df)) {
  
  cat("\n============================================================\n")
  cat("CANDIDATE VARIABLE VIF CHECK\n")
  cat("============================================================\n")
  
  for (exposure in exposure_vars) {
    
    cat("\n------------------------------------------------------------\n")
    cat("Candidate VIF for exposure:", exposure, "\n")
    cat("------------------------------------------------------------\n")
    
    # Only keep variables available in the candidate dataset
    available_covariates <- candidate_covariates[
      candidate_covariates %in% names(cox_candidate_vif_df)
    ]
    
    vif_table <- run_vif_check(
      data = cox_candidate_vif_df,
      exposure = exposure,
      covariates = available_covariates,
      label = "Candidate variables"
    )
    
    candidate_vif_all[[exposure]] <- vif_table
    
    print(vif_table)
  }
  
  candidate_vif_all <- bind_rows(candidate_vif_all)
  
  write.csv(
    candidate_vif_all,
    "candidate_vif_results.csv",
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}

# =========================================================
# 2. Final model VIF check
# Used to show final models have acceptable collinearity
# =========================================================

cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("FINAL MODEL VIF CHECK\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

final_vif_all <- list()

for (exposure in exposure_vars) {
  
  cat("\n------------------------------------------------------------\n")
  cat("Final VIF for exposure:", exposure, "\n")
  cat("------------------------------------------------------------\n")
  
  vif_table <- run_vif_check(
    data = cox_df,
    exposure = exposure,
    covariates = final_covariates,
    label = "Final model variables"
  )
  
  final_vif_all[[exposure]] <- vif_table
  
  print(vif_table)
}

final_vif_all <- bind_rows(final_vif_all)

write.csv(
  final_vif_all,
  "final_model_vif_results.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =========================================================
# 3. Baseline multivariable Cox models. See Page 19 in the report.
# =========================================================

make_baseline_formula <- function(exposure) {
  
  rhs <- c(exposure, final_covariates)
  
  as.formula(
    paste(
      "Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~",
      paste(rhs, collapse = " + ")
    )
  )
}

extract_cox_result <- function(model, model_name) {
  
  s <- summary(model)
  
  data.frame(
    model = model_name,
    variable = rownames(s$coefficients),
    beta = s$coefficients[, "coef"],
    HR = s$conf.int[, "exp(coef)"],
    CI_lower = s$conf.int[, "lower .95"],
    CI_upper = s$conf.int[, "upper .95"],
    p_value = s$coefficients[, "Pr(>|z|)"],
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

baseline_results <- list()

for (exposure in exposure_vars) {
  
  model_name <- paste0("Baseline model: ", exposure)
  
  cat("\n============================================================\n")
  cat(model_name, "\n")
  cat("============================================================\n")
  
  fit <- coxph(
    make_baseline_formula(exposure),
    data = cox_df,
    ties = "efron"
  )
  
  print(summary(fit))
  
  baseline_results[[exposure]] <- extract_cox_result(fit, model_name)
  
  rm(fit)
  gc()
}

baseline_hr_table <- bind_rows(baseline_results)

baseline_exposure_rows <- baseline_hr_table %>%
 dplyr:: filter(variable %in% exposure_vars)

cat("\n===== Baseline Cox Exposure Rows Only =====\n")
print(baseline_exposure_rows)

write.csv(
  baseline_hr_table,
  "baseline_multivariable_cox_hr_table.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  baseline_exposure_rows,
  "baseline_multivariable_cox_exposure_rows.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


# Piecewise Time-Interaction Cox Model (See Page 20 in the report)
```{r}
# =========================================================
# 03_piecewise_time_interaction_all_exposures.Rmd
# Purpose:
#   Run piecewise time-interaction Cox models for all three exposures.
#
# Outcome:
#   Time to alive hospital discharge
#
# Event:
#   hospital_discharge_event = 1
#
# Censoring:
#   in-hospital death
#
# Time periods:
#   0-7 days
#   >7 days
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(survival)

# =========================================================
# 1. Load final complete-case Cox dataset
# =========================================================

cox_df <- readRDS("cox_df_final_cc.rds")

cat("\n===== Original Cox Dataset =====\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(cox_df), "\n")
cat("Events:", sum(cox_df$hospital_discharge_event == 1), "\n")
cat("Censored:", sum(cox_df$hospital_discharge_event == 0), "\n")

# =========================================================
# 2. Define exposures and covariates
# =========================================================

exposure_vars <- c(
  "hypo_event_n",
  "hypo_twa",
  "hypo_duration_hours"
)

exposure_labels <- c(
  hypo_event_n = "Hypotension episode count",
  hypo_twa = "Time-weighted hypotension burden",
  hypo_duration_hours = "Cumulative hypotension duration"
)

selected_covariates <- c(
  "age_clean",
  "bmi",
  "gender_clean",
  "ethnicity",
  "surgery_type",
  "hypertension",
  "chf",
  "copd",
  "atrial_fibrillation",
  "diabetes",
  "renal_disease",
  "prior_mi"
)

model_vars <- c(
  "merged_id",
  "hospital_los_days",
  "hospital_discharge_event",
  exposure_vars,
  selected_covariates
)

model_df <- cox_df[, model_vars]

rm(cox_df)
gc()

model_df <- na.omit(model_df)
model_df <- droplevels(model_df)

cat("\n===== Model Dataset Before Splitting =====\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(model_df), "\n")
cat("Events:", sum(model_df$hospital_discharge_event == 1), "\n")
cat("Censored:", sum(model_df$hospital_discharge_event == 0), "\n")

# =========================================================
# 3. Split follow-up time at 7 days
# Counting-process format:
#   Surv(tstart, tstop, event)
# =========================================================

split_df <- survSplit(
  Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ .,
  data = model_df,
  cut = 7,
  episode = "period_id",
  start = "tstart",
  end = "tstop",
  event = "event"
)

rm(model_df)
gc()

split_df$time_period <- factor(
  split_df$period_id,
  levels = c(1, 2),
  labels = c("day_0_7", "day_after_7")
)

split_df <- droplevels(split_df)

cat("\n===== Split Model Dataset =====\n")
cat("Rows after splitting:", nrow(split_df), "\n")
cat("Events:", sum(split_df$event == 1), "\n")
cat("No-event interval rows:", sum(split_df$event == 0), "\n")
print(table(split_df$time_period, split_df$event))

# =========================================================
# 4. Helper function: extract Cox result table
# =========================================================

extract_cox_result <- function(fit, model_name, exposure) {

  coef_vec <- coef(fit)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(fit)

  se_vec <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))
  z_vec <- coef_vec / se_vec
  p_vec <- 2 * pnorm(abs(z_vec), lower.tail = FALSE)

  result_table <- data.frame(
    model = model_name,
    exposure = exposure,
    variable = names(coef_vec),
    beta = as.numeric(coef_vec),
    se = as.numeric(se_vec),
    HR = exp(as.numeric(coef_vec)),
    CI_lower = exp(as.numeric(coef_vec) - 1.96 * as.numeric(se_vec)),
    CI_upper = exp(as.numeric(coef_vec) + 1.96 * as.numeric(se_vec)),
    z = as.numeric(z_vec),
    p_value = as.numeric(p_vec),
    row.names = NULL
  )

  return(result_table)
}

# =========================================================
# 5. Helper function: extract key exposure-by-time rows
# =========================================================

extract_key_rows <- function(result_table, exposure) {

  key_rows <- result_table %>%
   dplyr:: filter(
      grepl(paste0("^", exposure, ":time_period"), variable) |
        grepl(paste0("^time_period.*:", exposure), variable)
    )

  return(key_rows)
}

# =========================================================
# 6. Helper function: compare 0-7 days vs >7 days
#
# H0:
#   beta_0_7 = beta_after_7
#
# If p < 0.05:
#   exposure effect differs significantly between periods.
# =========================================================

period_difference_test <- function(fit, exposure) {

  coef_vec <- coef(fit)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(fit)
  coef_names <- names(coef_vec)

  early_name <- coef_names[
    grepl(paste0(exposure, ":time_periodday_0_7"), coef_names) |
      grepl(paste0("time_periodday_0_7:", exposure), coef_names)
  ]

  late_name <- coef_names[
    grepl(paste0(exposure, ":time_periodday_after_7"), coef_names) |
      grepl(paste0("time_periodday_after_7:", exposure), coef_names)
  ]

  if (length(early_name) != 1 | length(late_name) != 1) {

    warning("Could not identify both period-specific exposure coefficients.")

    return(
      data.frame(
        exposure = exposure,
        comparison = "0-7 days vs >7 days",
        beta_0_7 = NA_real_,
        beta_after_7 = NA_real_,
        HR_0_7 = NA_real_,
        HR_after_7 = NA_real_,
        beta_difference = NA_real_,
        HR_ratio = NA_real_,
        se_difference = NA_real_,
        z = NA_real_,
        p_value_for_difference = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }

  beta_early <- coef_vec[early_name]
  beta_late <- coef_vec[late_name]

  beta_diff <- beta_early - beta_late

  se_diff <- sqrt(
    vcov_mat[early_name, early_name] +
      vcov_mat[late_name, late_name] -
      2 * vcov_mat[early_name, late_name]
  )

  z_diff <- beta_diff / se_diff
  p_diff <- 2 * pnorm(abs(z_diff), lower.tail = FALSE)

  test_table <- data.frame(
    exposure = exposure,
    comparison = "0-7 days vs >7 days",
    beta_0_7 = as.numeric(beta_early),
    beta_after_7 = as.numeric(beta_late),
    HR_0_7 = exp(as.numeric(beta_early)),
    HR_after_7 = exp(as.numeric(beta_late)),
    beta_difference = as.numeric(beta_diff),
    HR_ratio = exp(as.numeric(beta_diff)),
    se_difference = as.numeric(se_diff),
    z = as.numeric(z_diff),
    p_value_for_difference = as.numeric(p_diff),
    row.names = NULL
  )

  return(test_table)
}

# =========================================================
# 7. Fit piecewise time-interaction Cox models
# =========================================================

all_full_results <- list()
all_key_results <- list()
all_difference_tests <- list()

for (exposure in exposure_vars) {

  model_name <- paste0("Piecewise time-interaction Cox model: ", exposure)

  cat("\n============================================================\n")
  cat(model_name, "\n")
  cat("Exposure label:", exposure_labels[exposure], "\n")
  cat("============================================================\n")

  rhs_terms <- c(
    paste0(exposure, ":time_period"),
    selected_covariates,
    "strata(time_period)"
  )

  piecewise_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "Surv(tstart, tstop, event) ~",
      paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")
    )
  )

  cat("\n===== Formula =====\n")
  print(piecewise_formula)

  fit <- coxph(
    piecewise_formula,
    data = split_df,
    ties = "breslow",
    model = FALSE,
    x = FALSE,
    y = FALSE
  )

  # Full result table
  full_result <- extract_cox_result(
    fit = fit,
    model_name = model_name,
    exposure = exposure
  )

  # Exposure-by-period rows only
  key_result <- extract_key_rows(
    result_table = full_result,
    exposure = exposure
  )

  # Formal difference test between periods
  diff_test <- period_difference_test(
    fit = fit,
    exposure = exposure
  )

  cat("\n===== Key Exposure-by-Time-Period Rows =====\n")
  print(key_result)

  cat("\n===== Period Difference Test =====\n")
  print(diff_test)

  all_full_results[[exposure]] <- full_result
  all_key_results[[exposure]] <- key_result
  all_difference_tests[[exposure]] <- diff_test

  rm(fit, full_result, key_result, diff_test)
  gc()
}

# =========================================================
# 8. Combine results
# =========================================================

piecewise_full_results <- bind_rows(all_full_results)
piecewise_key_results <- bind_rows(all_key_results)
piecewise_difference_tests <- bind_rows(all_difference_tests)

cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("COMBINED KEY EXPOSURE-BY-TIME-PERIOD RESULTS\n")
cat("============================================================\n")
print(piecewise_key_results)

cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("COMBINED PERIOD DIFFERENCE TESTS\n")
cat("============================================================\n")
print(piecewise_difference_tests)

# =========================================================
# 9. Save results.
# =========================================================

write.csv(
  piecewise_full_results,
  "piecewise_time_interaction_all_exposures_full.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  piecewise_key_results,
  "piecewise_time_interaction_all_exposures_key_rows.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  piecewise_difference_tests,
  "piecewise_time_interaction_all_exposures_period_difference_tests.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nSaved files:\n")
cat("piecewise_time_interaction_all_exposures_full.csv\n")
cat("piecewise_time_interaction_all_exposures_key_rows.csv\n")
cat("piecewise_time_interaction_all_exposures_period_difference_tests.csv\n")

# =========================================================
# 10. Clear memory
# =========================================================

rm(
  split_df,
  all_full_results,
  all_key_results,
  all_difference_tests,
  piecewise_key_results,
  piecewise_difference_tests
)

gc()
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# Final Figures for Multivariable Cox Model Results. See Page 31 in the report.
# Figures:
# 1. Baseline multivariable Cox forest plot
# 2. Piecewise time-interaction Cox plot
# 3. Schoenfeld residual plots for PH assumption check
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(survival)

# =========================================================
# Figure 1: Baseline Multivariable Cox Forest Plot
# =========================================================

baseline_df <- data.frame(
  Exposure = c(
    "Number of hypotension episodes",
    "Time-weighted hypotension burden",
    "Cumulative hypotension duration"
  ),
  HR = c(0.987, 0.944, 0.977),
  Lower = c(0.986, 0.934, 0.976),
  Upper = c(0.988, 0.955, 0.978)
)

baseline_df$Exposure <- factor(
  baseline_df$Exposure,
  levels = rev(baseline_df$Exposure)
)

p_baseline <- ggplot(baseline_df, aes(x = HR, y = Exposure)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper), height = 0.18, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0.92, 1.01),
    breaks = seq(0.92, 1.00, 0.02)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Baseline Multivariable Cox Model",
    subtitle = "Adjusted hazard ratios for alive hospital discharge",
    x = "Adjusted hazard ratio",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p_baseline)

ggsave(
  filename = "base.png",
  plot = p_baseline,
  width = 8.5,
  height = 4.8,
  dpi = 300
)


# =========================================================
# Figure 2: Piecewise Time-Interaction Cox Plot
# =========================================================

piecewise_df <- data.frame(
  Exposure = rep(c(
    "Number of hypotension episodes",
    "Time-weighted hypotension burden",
    "Cumulative hypotension duration"
  ), each = 2),
  Period = rep(c("0–7 days", ">7 days"), times = 3),
  HR = c(
    0.960, 0.992,
    0.923, 0.961,
    0.935, 0.986
  ),
  Lower = c(
    0.958, 0.991,
    0.907, 0.948,
    0.931, 0.984
  ),
  Upper = c(
    0.962, 0.993,
    0.939, 0.975,
    0.939, 0.987
  )
)

piecewise_df$Exposure <- factor(
  piecewise_df$Exposure,
  levels = rev(c(
    "Number of hypotension episodes",
    "Time-weighted hypotension burden",
    "Cumulative hypotension duration"
  ))
)

piecewise_df$Period <- factor(
  piecewise_df$Period,
  levels = c("0–7 days", ">7 days")
)

p_piecewise <- ggplot(
  piecewise_df,
  aes(x = HR, y = Exposure, shape = Period)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    height = 0.18,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0.90, 1.01),
    breaks = seq(0.90, 1.00, 0.02)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Piecewise Time-Interaction Cox Model",
    subtitle = "Exposure effects during 0–7 days and after 7 days",
    x = "Hazard ratio for alive hospital discharge",
    y = NULL,
    shape = "Time period"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p_piecewise)

ggsave(
  filename = "piecewise.png",
  plot = p_piecewise,
  width = 8.5,
  height = 5.2,
  dpi = 300
)


# =========================================================
# Figure 3: Schoenfeld Residual Plots for PH Assumption Check
# =========================================================

# Load complete-case dataset
if (file.exists("cox_df_final_cc.rds")) {
  cc_data <- readRDS("cox_df_final_cc.rds")
} else {
  cc_data <- read.csv("cox_df_final_cc.csv")
}

model_vars <- c(
  "hospital_los_days",
  "hospital_discharge_event",
  "hypo_event_n",
  "hypo_twa",
  "hypo_duration_hours",
  "age_clean",
  "bmi",
  "gender_clean",
  "ethnicity",
  "surgery_type",
  "hypertension",
  "chf",
  "copd",
  "atrial_fibrillation",
  "diabetes",
  "renal_disease",
  "prior_mi"
)

missing_vars <- setdiff(model_vars, names(cc_data))
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing variables:", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", ")))
}

cc_data <- cc_data %>%
  select(all_of(model_vars)) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(
    gender_clean = as.factor(gender_clean),
    ethnicity = as.factor(ethnicity),
    surgery_type = as.factor(surgery_type)
  )

extract_schoenfeld <- function(exposure_var, exposure_label) {
  
  model_formula <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ ",
    exposure_var,
    " + age_clean + bmi + gender_clean + ethnicity + surgery_type + ",
    "hypertension + chf + copd + atrial_fibrillation + diabetes + renal_disease + prior_mi"
  ))
  
  fit <- coxph(
    model_formula,
    data = cc_data,
    ties = "efron",
    x = TRUE
  )
  
  ph <- cox.zph(fit, transform = "identity")
  
  cat("\n=================================================\n")
  cat("PH test for:", exposure_label, "\n")
  print(ph)
  
  data.frame(
    time = ph$x,
    residual = ph$y[, exposure_var],
    exposure = exposure_label
  )
}

resid_all <- bind_rows(
  extract_schoenfeld("hypo_event_n", "Number of hypotension episodes"),
  extract_schoenfeld("hypo_twa", "Time-weighted hypotension burden"),
  extract_schoenfeld("hypo_duration_hours", "Cumulative hypotension duration")
)

resid_all$exposure <- factor(
  resid_all$exposure,
  levels = c(
    "Number of hypotension episodes",
    "Time-weighted hypotension burden",
    "Cumulative hypotension duration"
  )
)

p_schoenfeld <- ggplot(resid_all, aes(x = time, y = residual)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, size = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ exposure, ncol = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, 30),
    ylim = c(-0.5, 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Schoenfeld Residual Plots for PH Assumption Check",
    subtitle = "Baseline multivariable Cox models for three hypotension burden measures",
    x = "Hospital length of stay (days)",
    y = "Scaled Schoenfeld residuals"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.1, "lines")
  )

print(p_schoenfeld) 

ggsave(
  filename = "VIF.png",
  plot = p_schoenfeld,
  width = 9.5,
  height = 7.2,
  dpi = 300
)
```


# Sentitivity Analysis. See Page 34 in the report.
```{r}
# =========================================================
# 04_sensitivity_analysis_piecewise_median_bmi_imputation.Rmd
# Purpose:
#   Sensitivity analysis using:
#     - Median BMI imputation
#     - Piecewise Cox time-interaction model
#     - Split at 7 days
#
# Outcome:
#   Time to alive hospital discharge
#
# Event:
#   hospital_discharge_event = 1
#
# Censoring:
#   in-hospital death
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(survival)

# =========================================================
# 1. Start from pre-complete-case dataset
# IMPORTANT:
#   Use cox_pre_df BEFORE na.omit()
# =========================================================

cat("\n===== Original Pre-CC Dataset =====\n")

cat("Rows:", nrow(cox_pre_df), "\n")
```
