```{r}
# =========================================================
# 2. Construct sensitivity-analysis dataset
# Only BMI missing values are imputed
# =========================================================

sens_df <- cox_pre_df %>%
  transmute(
    merged_id,

    hospital_los_days,
    hospital_discharge_event,

    hypo_event_n,
    hypo_twa,
    hypo_duration_hours,

    age_clean,
    bmi,

    gender_clean = as.factor(gender_clean),
    ethnicity = as.factor(ethnicity),
    surgery_type = as.factor(surgery_type),

    hypertension = as.factor(hypertension),
    chf = as.factor(chf),
    copd = as.factor(copd),
    atrial_fibrillation = as.factor(atrial_fibrillation),
    diabetes = as.factor(diabetes),
    renal_disease = as.factor(renal_disease),
    prior_mi = as.factor(prior_mi)
  ) %>%
 dplyr:: filter(
    !is.na(hospital_los_days),
    hospital_los_days > 0,
    !is.na(hospital_discharge_event)
  )

# =========================================================
# 3. Median BMI imputation
# =========================================================

median_bmi <- median(
  sens_df$bmi,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

cat("\n===== Median BMI =====\n")
print(median_bmi)

sens_df <- sens_df %>%
  mutate(
    bmi = ifelse(
      is.na(bmi),
      median_bmi,
      bmi
    )
  )

# =========================================================
# 4. Remove remaining missing values
# Other variables still use complete-case
# =========================================================

cat("\n===== Missingness Before Final Filtering =====\n")

print(
  sort(
    colSums(is.na(sens_df)),
    decreasing = TRUE
  )
)

sens_df <- sens_df %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  droplevels()

# =========================================================
# 5. Reference groups
# =========================================================

if ("Female" %in% levels(sens_df$gender_clean)) {
  sens_df$gender_clean <- relevel(
    sens_df$gender_clean,
    ref = "Female"
  )
}

if ("Caucasian" %in% levels(sens_df$ethnicity)) {
  sens_df$ethnicity <- relevel(
    sens_df$ethnicity,
    ref = "Caucasian"
  )
}

if ("Non-surgical" %in% levels(sens_df$surgery_type)) {
  sens_df$surgery_type <- relevel(
    sens_df$surgery_type,
    ref = "Non-surgical"
  )
}

cat("\n===== Sensitivity Dataset =====\n")

cat("Rows:", nrow(sens_df), "\n")

cat(
  "Events:",
  sum(sens_df$hospital_discharge_event == 1),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Censored:",
  sum(sens_df$hospital_discharge_event == 0),
  "\n"
)

# =========================================================
# 6. Define exposures and covariates
# =========================================================

exposure_vars <- c(
  "hypo_event_n",
  "hypo_twa",
  "hypo_duration_hours"
)

selected_covariates <- c(
  "age_clean",
  "bmi",
  "gender_clean",
  "ethnicity",
  "surgery_type",
  "hypertension",
  "chf",
  "copd",
  "atrial_fibrillation",
  "diabetes",
  "renal_disease",
  "prior_mi"
)

# =========================================================
# 7. Split follow-up time at 7 days
# =========================================================

split_df <- survSplit(
  Surv(hospital_los_days, hospital_discharge_event) ~ .,
  data = sens_df,
  cut = 7,
  episode = "period_id",
  start = "tstart",
  end = "tstop",
  event = "event"
)

split_df$time_period <- factor(
  split_df$period_id,
  levels = c(1, 2),
  labels = c("day_0_7", "day_after_7")
)

split_df <- droplevels(split_df)

cat("\n===== Split Dataset =====\n")

cat("Rows:", nrow(split_df), "\n")

print(table(split_df$time_period, split_df$event))

# =========================================================
# 8. Helper function
# =========================================================

extract_key_rows <- function(
    fit,
    exposure,
    model_name
) {

  coef_vec <- coef(fit)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(fit)

  se_vec <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))

  result_table <- data.frame(
    model = model_name,
    exposure = exposure,
    variable = names(coef_vec),
    beta = as.numeric(coef_vec),
    HR = exp(as.numeric(coef_vec)),
    CI_lower = exp(as.numeric(coef_vec) - 1.96 * as.numeric(se_vec)),
    CI_upper = exp(as.numeric(coef_vec) + 1.96 * as.numeric(se_vec)),
    p_value = 2 * pnorm(
      abs(as.numeric(coef_vec) / as.numeric(se_vec)),
      lower.tail = FALSE
    ),
    row.names = NULL
  )

  key_rows <- result_table %>%
   dplyr:: filter(
      grepl(
        paste0("^", exposure, ":time_period"),
        variable
      ) |
      grepl(
        paste0("^time_period.*:", exposure),
        variable
      )
    )

  return(key_rows)
}

# =========================================================
# 9. Run piecewise sensitivity Cox models
# =========================================================

all_results <- list()

for (exposure in exposure_vars) {

  cat("\n====================================================\n")
  cat("Sensitivity Piecewise Model:", exposure, "\n")
  cat("====================================================\n")

  rhs_terms <- c(
    paste0(exposure, ":time_period"),
    selected_covariates,
    "strata(time_period)"
  )

  piecewise_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "Surv(tstart, tstop, event) ~",
      paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")
    )
  )

  print(piecewise_formula)

  fit <- coxph(
    piecewise_formula,
    data = split_df,
    ties = "breslow",
    model = FALSE,
    x = FALSE,
    y = FALSE
  )

  result <- extract_key_rows(
    fit = fit,
    exposure = exposure,
    model_name = "Median BMI imputation sensitivity analysis"
  )

  print(result)

  all_results[[exposure]] <- result

  rm(fit, result)
  gc()
}

# =========================================================
# 10. Combine results
# =========================================================

sensitivity_piecewise_results <- bind_rows(all_results)

cat("\n===== Final Sensitivity Results =====\n")

print(sensitivity_piecewise_results)

# =========================================================
# 11. Save results
# =========================================================

write.csv(
  sensitivity_piecewise_results,
  "sensitivity_piecewise_median_bmi_imputation.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nSaved file:\n")

cat("sensitivity_piecewise_median_bmi_imputation.csv\n")

# =========================================================
# 12. Clear memory
# =========================================================

rm(
  sens_df,
  split_df,
  sensitivity_piecewise_results
)

gc()
```


```{r}
# Forest plot
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

forest_df <- data.frame(

  exposure = c(
    "Hypotension episode count", "Hypotension episode count",
    "Hypotension episode count", "Hypotension episode count",

    "TWA hypotension burden", "TWA hypotension burden",
    "TWA hypotension burden", "TWA hypotension burden",

    "Hypotension duration", "Hypotension duration",
    "Hypotension duration", "Hypotension duration"
  ),

  period = c(
    "0-7 days", ">7 days",
    "0-7 days", ">7 days",
    "0-7 days", ">7 days",
    "0-7 days", ">7 days",
    "0-7 days", ">7 days",
    "0-7 days", ">7 days"
  ),

  analysis = c(
    "Primary", "Primary",
    "Sensitivity", "Sensitivity",

    "Primary", "Primary",
    "Sensitivity", "Sensitivity",

    "Primary", "Primary",
    "Sensitivity", "Sensitivity"
  ),

  HR = c(
    0.960, 0.992, 0.960, 0.992,

    0.923, 0.961, 0.920, 0.961,

    0.935, 0.986, 0.934, 0.986
  ),

  lower = c(
    0.958, 0.991, 0.958, 0.992,

    0.907, 0.948, 0.904, 0.947,

    0.931, 0.984, 0.931, 0.985
  ),

  upper = c(
    0.962, 0.993, 0.962, 0.993,

    0.939, 0.975, 0.935, 0.975,

    0.939, 0.987, 0.938, 0.987
  )
)
# =========================================================
# Create labels
# =========================================================

forest_df <- forest_df %>%
  mutate(
    label = paste0(
      exposure,
      "\n",
      period
    )
  )

# order
forest_df$label <- factor(
  forest_df$label,
  levels = rev(c(

    "Hypotension episode count\n0-7 days",
    "Hypotension episode count\n>7 days",

    "TWA hypotension burden\n0-7 days",
    "TWA hypotension burden\n>7 days",

    "Hypotension duration\n0-7 days",
    "Hypotension duration\n>7 days"
  ))
)

# =========================================================
# Forest plot
# =========================================================

forest_plot <- ggplot(
  forest_df,
  aes(
    x = HR,
    y = label,
    color = analysis,
    shape = analysis
  )
) +

  # reference line
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 1,
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.7,
    color = "gray50"
  ) +

  # Primary CI
  geom_errorbarh(
    data = subset(forest_df, analysis == "Primary"),
    aes(
      xmin = lower,
      xmax = upper
    ),
    height = 0.12,
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +

  # Sensitivity CI slightly shifted
  geom_errorbarh(
    data = subset(forest_df, analysis == "Sensitivity"),
    aes(
      xmin = lower,
      xmax = upper
    ),
    height = 0.12,
    linewidth = 0.9,

    position = position_nudge(y = -0.18)
  ) +

  # Primary points
  geom_point(
    data = subset(forest_df, analysis == "Primary"),
    size = 2.8,
    stroke=0.3
  ) +

  # Sensitivity points
  geom_point(
    data = subset(forest_df, analysis == "Sensitivity"),
    size = 2.8,

    # 核心
    position = position_nudge(y = -0.18)
  ) +

  # colors
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Primary" = "#C44E52",
      "Sensitivity" = "#4C72B0"
    )
  ) +

  # shapes
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "Primary" = 16,
      "Sensitivity" = 17
    )
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0.90, 1.005),

    breaks = c(
      0.90,
      0.92,
      0.94,
      0.96,
      0.98,
      1.00
    )
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Primary and Sensitivity Analyses",
    subtitle = "Hazard ratios with 95% confidence intervals",
    x = "Hazard Ratio",
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL,
    shape = NULL
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +

  theme(

    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 16,
      face = "bold",
      hjust = 0.5
    ),

    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 11,
      hjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(b = 15)
    ),

    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 17,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 13
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      lineheight = 0.95
    ),

    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(
      color = "gray92",
      linewidth = 0.4
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),

    legend.position = "bottom",

    legend.text = element_text(
      size = 11
    )
  )
forest_plot
ggsave(
  filename = "Sensitivity_Forest_Plot.png",
  plot = forest_plot,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "Sensitivity_Forest_Plot.pdf",
  plot = forest_plot,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)
```



# Supplementary Materials (See Page 40 in the report.)
```{r}
# =========================================================
# Supplementary: Table S1~S8 and Figure S1&S2
# Merging Process Summary  (See Page 40 in the report.)
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# =========================================================
# 1. Index ICU stay information
# =========================================================

index_stays <- hospital_level %>%
  dplyr::filter(is_index == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    operative_status = ifelse(
      has_operative_dx == 1,
      "Operative",
      "Non-operative"
    )
  )

# =========================================================
# i + ii
# Number of operative/non-operative index ICU stays
# ICU type distribution
# =========================================================

icu_type_summary <- index_stays %>%
  count(
    operative_status,
    unittype
  ) %>%
  group_by(operative_status) %>%
  mutate(
    percent = n / sum(n) * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("\n=============================\n")
cat("INDEX ICU STAY SUMMARY\n")
cat("=============================\n")

index_stays %>%
  count(operative_status) %>%
  print()

cat("\n===== ICU Type Distribution =====\n")
print(icu_type_summary)

# =========================================================
# Figure S1
# Operative ICU types
# =========================================================

icu_type_summary %>%
  dplyr::filter(operative_status == "Operative") %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = reorder(unittype, percent),
      y = percent
    )
  ) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4C72B0") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure S1. ICU Type Distribution Among Operative Index ICU Stays",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Percentage (%)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

# =========================================================
# Figure S2
# Non-operative ICU types
# =========================================================

icu_type_summary %>%
  dplyr::filter(operative_status == "Non-operative") %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = reorder(unittype, percent),
      y = percent
    )
  ) +
  geom_col(fill = "#55A868") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure S2. ICU Type Distribution Among Non-operative Index ICU Stays",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Percentage (%)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

# =========================================================
# iii
# Any ICU stay before index ICU?
# =========================================================

prior_icu_summary <- hospital_level %>%
  group_by(patienthealthsystemstayid) %>%
  arrange(start_time, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    row_id = row_number(),
    index_position = row_id[is_index == 1][1]
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    had_prior_icu =
      any(row_id < index_position),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  count(had_prior_icu)

cat("\n===== Prior ICU Before Index ICU =====\n")
print(prior_icu_summary)

# =========================================================
# iv
# Time before index ICU
# =========================================================

pre_index_time <- hospital_level %>%
  group_by(patienthealthsystemstayid) %>%
  arrange(start_time, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    row_id = row_number(),
    index_position = row_id[is_index == 1][1]
  ) %>%
  summarise(

    hospital_time_before_index_hr =
      abs(first(start_time[is_index == 1])) / 60,

    prior_icu_time_hr =
      sum(
        unitdischargeoffset[row_id < index_position],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) / 60,

    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\n===== Hospital Time Before Index ICU (hours) =====\n")
print(
  summary(
    pre_index_time$hospital_time_before_index_hr
  )
)

cat("\n===== Prior ICU Time Before Index ICU (hours) =====\n")
print(
  summary(
    pre_index_time$prior_icu_time_hr
  )
)

# =========================================================
# v
# Unit stay type of index ICU
# =========================================================

index_unitstay_summary <- index_stays %>%
  count(unitstaytype) %>%
  mutate(
    percent =
      round(
        n / sum(n) * 100,
        1
      )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

cat("\n===== Index ICU Unit Stay Type =====\n")
print(index_unitstay_summary)

# =========================================================
# vi
# Operative diagnosis but NO MAP
# =========================================================

operative_without_map <- icu_full %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    has_operative_dx == 1,
    has_map == 0
  )

cat("\n===== Operative ICU Stays Without MAP =====\n")

cat(
  "N =",
  nrow(operative_without_map),
  "\n"
)

operative_without_map %>%
  count(unittype) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  print()

# =========================================================
# Table S1
# =========================================================

table_s1 <- list(

  operative_index_n =
    sum(index_stays$operative_status == "Operative"),

  nonoperative_index_n =
    sum(index_stays$operative_status == "Non-operative"),

  prior_icu_summary =
    prior_icu_summary,

  hospital_time_before_index =
    summary(
      pre_index_time$hospital_time_before_index_hr
    ),

  prior_icu_time_before_index =
    summary(
      pre_index_time$prior_icu_time_hr
    ),

  index_unitstay_summary =
    index_unitstay_summary,

  operative_without_map_n =
    nrow(operative_without_map)

)

cat("\n=============================\n")
cat("TABLE S1 READY\n")
cat("=============================\n")


# =========================================================
# Supplementary Table S6. See Page 42 in the report.
# Hypotension events
# =========================================================

table_S6 <- piecewise_full_results %>%
 dplyr:: filter(exposure == "hypo_event_n") %>%
  mutate(
    HR_CI = sprintf(
      "%.3f (%.3f–%.3f)",
      HR,
      CI_lower,
      CI_upper
    ),
    p_value = ifelse(
      p_value < 0.001,
      "<0.001",
      sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable = variable,
    HR_CI,
    p_value
  )

print(table_S6, n = Inf)


# =========================================================
# Supplementary Table S7. See Page 43 in the report.
# Time-weighted average hypotension
# =========================================================

table_S7 <- piecewise_full_results %>%
 dplyr:: filter(exposure == "hypo_twa") %>%
  mutate(
    HR_CI = sprintf(
      "%.3f (%.3f–%.3f)",
      HR,
      CI_lower,
      CI_upper
    ),
    p_value = ifelse(
      p_value < 0.001,
      "<0.001",
      sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable = variable,
    HR_CI,
    p_value
  )

print(table_S7, n = Inf)


# =========================================================
# Supplementary Table S8. See Page 44 in the report.
# Hypotension duration
# =========================================================

table_S8 <- piecewise_full_results %>%
 dplyr:: filter(exposure == "hypo_duration_hours") %>%
  mutate(
    HR_CI = sprintf(
      "%.3f (%.3f–%.3f)",
      HR,
      CI_lower,
      CI_upper
    ),
    p_value = ifelse(
      p_value < 0.001,
      "<0.001",
      sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable = variable,
    HR_CI,
    p_value
  )

print(table_S8, n = Inf)

```
